final_answer: Source records do not close the action boundary. The control record (SRC-E8F1AFC099F1-CTL) explicitly states the bonus pool, employee eligibility, and approver limit match is missing, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Communication tone is irrelevant. Escalation is required before any bonus release or HR/payroll execution within the approved pool.
